sentences.arabic: تَشْهَدُ الْخَرِيطَةُ السِّيَاسِيَّةُ الْعَالَمِيَّةُ فِي الْآوِنَةِ الْأَخِيرَةِ مَخَاضًا عَسِيرًا.
sentences.translation: Svjetska politička mapa u posljednje vrijeme prolazi kroz težak porođaj.
sentences.translationEn: The global political map has recently been undergoing an arduous labor.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا الْمَخَاضُ يُنْبِئُ بِأُفُولِ حِقْبَةِ الْقُطْبِيَّةِ الْأُحَادِيَّةِ وَبُزُوغِ فَجْرِ نِظَامٍ مُتَعَدِّدِ الْأَقْطَابِ.
sentences.translation: Taj proces nagovještava kraj ere unipolarne moći i svitanje novog multipolarnog poretka.
sentences.translationEn: This process portends the fading of the era of unipolarity and the dawn of a multipolar system.

sentences.arabic: هُنَا تَتَشَابَكُ الْمَصَالِحُ الِاقْتِصَادِيَّةُ مَعَ التَّجَاذُبَاتِ الْجِيُوسِيَاسِيَّةِ فِي مَشْهَدٍ بَالِغِ التَّعْقِيدِ.
sentences.translation: Ovdje se ekonomski interesi isprepliću s geopolitičkim tenzijama u izuzetno složenom prizoru.
sentences.translationEn: Here, economic interests intertwine with geopolitical tensions in a highly complex scene.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ هَذَا التَّحَوُّلَ الْجِذْرِيَّ لَيْسَ مُجَرَّدَ تَبَدُّلٍ عَابِرٍ فِي مَوَازِينِ الْقُوَى.
sentences.translation: Ova korjenita promjena nije samo prolazna izmjena u ravnoteži snaga.
sentences.translationEn: This radical shift is not merely a transient change in the balance of power.

sentences.arabic: بَلْ هُوَ إِعَادَةُ صِيَاغَةٍ شَامِلَةٍ لِلْمَوَاثِيقِ الدَّوْلِيَّةِ الَّتِي سَادَتْ عُقُودًا طَوِيلَةً.
sentences.translation: Naprotiv, to je sveobuhvatno redefinisanje međunarodnih povelja koje su dominirale decenijama.
sentences.translationEn: Rather, it is a comprehensive rewriting of the international charters that prevailed for long decades.

sentences.arabic: تَبْرُزُ الْقُوَى الصَّاعِدَةُ الْيَوْمَ كَفَوَاعِلَ رَئِيسِيَّةٍ فِي السَّاحَةِ الدَّوْلِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Sile u usponu danas se pojavljuju kao ključni akteri na međunarodnoj sceni.
sentences.translationEn: Rising powers are emerging today as key actors on the international stage.

sentences.arabic: هِيَ تَسْعَى لِتَحْقِيقِ نَوْعٍ مِنَ التَّوَازُنِ الِاسْتِرَاتِيجِيِّ الْمَفْقُودِ.
sentences.translation: One nastoje postići vrstu izgubljene strateške ravnoteže.
sentences.translationEn: They seek to achieve a kind of lost strategic balance.

sentences.arabic: مِمَّا يَفْرِضُ عَلَى الدِّبْلُومَاسِيَّةِ التَّقْلِيدِيَّةِ ابْتِكَارَ آليَّاتٍ جَدِيدَةٍ لِاحْتِوَاءِ الْأَزَمَاتِ.
sentences.translation: To nameće tradicionalnoj diplomatiji potrebu za inoviranjem novih mehanizama za obuzdavanje kriza.
sentences.translationEn: This forces traditional diplomacy to innovate new mechanisms for containing crises.

sentences.arabic: كَمَا يَتَطَلَّبُ ذَلِكَ مَنْعَ الِانْزِلَاقِ نَحْوَ مَوَاجَهَاتٍ صِفْرِيَّةٍ قَدْ تَعْصِفُ بِالِاسْتِقْرَارِ الْكَوْنِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Također, to zahtijeva sprječavanje klizanja ka sukobima s nultom sumom koji bi mogli ugroziti globalnu stabilnost.
sentences.translationEn: It also requires preventing a slide toward zero-sum confrontations that could devastate global stability.

sentences.arabic: وَمَعَ تَصَاعُدِ وَتِيرَةِ التَّنَافُسِ التِّكْنُولُوجِيِّ، يَبْدُو أَنَّ السِّيَادَةَ لَمْ تَعُدْ تُرْتَهَنُ بِالْقُوَّةِ الْعَسْكَرِيَّةِ فَحَسْبُ.
sentences.translation: Sa porastom tempa tehnološke konkurencije, čini se da suverenitet više ne zavisi samo od vojne moći.
sentences.translationEn: With the rising pace of technological competition, it seems that sovereignty is no longer contingent upon military force alone.

sentences.arabic: بَلْ بَاتَتْ تُرْتَهَنُ بِالْقُدْرَةِ عَلَى قِيَادَةِ سَلَاسِلِ التَّوْرِيدِ الْعَالَمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: On je postao zavisan od sposobnosti vođenja globalnih lanaca snabdijevanja.
sentences.translationEn: Instead, it has become contingent upon the ability to lead global supply chains.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ التَّحَدِّيَ الْأَكْبَرَ يَتَمَثَّلُ فِي كَيْفِيَّةِ صَهْرِ التَّبَايُنَاتِ فِي بُوتَقَةِ التَّعَاوُنِ.
sentences.translation: Najveći izazov leži u tome kako stopiti ove razlike u kotlu saradnje.
sentences.translationEn: The greatest challenge lies in how to fuse these differences in the crucible of cooperation.

sentences.arabic: فَالرِّهَانُ الْيَوْمَ يَقُومُ عَلَى مَدَى قُدْرَةِ الدُّوَلِ عَلَى التَّخَلِّي عَنْ عَقْلِيَّةِ الِاسْتِقْطَابِ.
sentences.translation: Današnji ulog počiva na sposobnosti država da se odreknu mentaliteta oštre polarizacije.
sentences.translationEn: The stake today rests on the extent of nations' ability to abandon the mentality of sharp polarization.

sentences.arabic: لَا رَيْبَ أَنَّ الطَّرِيقَ نَحْوَ نِظَامٍ أَكْثَرَ عَدَالَةً لَا يَزَالُ مَحْفُوفًا بِالْمَخَاطِرِ.
sentences.translation: Nema sumnje da je put ka pravednijem sistemu i dalje pun opasnosti.
sentences.translationEn: There is no doubt that the path toward a more just system is still fraught with dangers.

sentences.arabic: لَكِنَّ الضَّرُورَةَ التَّارِيخِيَّةَ تُحَتِّمُ السَّيْرَ فِي هَذَا الِاتِّجَاهِ لِتَجَنُّبِ الْفَوْضَى.
sentences.translation: Međutim, historijska nužnost nalaže kretanje u tom pravcu kako bi se izbjegao haos.
sentences.translationEn: However, historical necessity dictates moving in this direction to avoid chaos.
